scope: wave2 fan-out migration: 3 of legacy's 5 streams (events, categories, users) are declarative Tier-1 parity. The remaining 2 legacy streams (attendees, tickets) are per-event sub-resource fan-out reads (list events, then GET /events/{event_id}/<child> for every discovered event id) — a documented Tier-2 StreamHook trigger (docs/migration/conventions.md §1's 'sub-resource fan-out reads' example) that this JSON-only wave cannot express; see docs.md's Known limits and this connector's reported blocker.

excluded.reason: per-event sub-resource fan-out (list events, then fetch attendees per event id) requires a Tier-2 StreamHook; not expressible in this JSON-only wave. Follow-up wave: add hooks/eventzilla/hooks.go implementing StreamHook for this stream.

per-event sub-resource fan-out (list events, then fetch ticket types per event id) requires a Tier-2 StreamHook; not expressible in this JSON-only wave. Follow-up wave: add hooks/eventzilla/hooks.go implementing StreamHook for this stream.
